chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Bail Application No.183 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of bail application --------------------------------------------- 30.04.2025 Faqeer Qurban Ali Soomro, advocate for applicant Ms. Seema Zaidi, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh. Mr. Muhammad Daud Narejo, advocate for complainant ------------------------------ Applicant Hameero son of Mamoon Charan seeks pre- arrest bail in FIR No.03/2025, registered at P.S. Sujawal for offence under section 489-F, PPC, after rejection of his bail plea by learned 1st Additional Sessions Judge, Sujawal vide order dated 20.01.2025. Learned counsel for applicant submits that during pendency of instant criminal bail application parties have settled their dispute outside the Court and learned trial Court has acquitted the applicant of the charge vide order dated 24.04.2025 by way of compromise. Learned counsel for applicant by way of his statement has placed certified copy of order dated 24.04.2025 passed by learned Civil Judge & Judicial Magistrate, Sujawal, it is taken on record. Learned counsel for complainant has also filed statement along with detail of cheques which were issued by the applicant/accused in lieu of compromise arrived at between the parties. In view of above, instant criminal bail application has become infructuous, it is accordingly dismissed. So far as the surety furnished in the instant criminal bail application is concerned, it is no more required. Nazir is directed to return the surety, however, after proper verification and identification, as per rules. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
